# Add budgeting and financial planning

## Summary

Implement budgeting and financial planning so users can actively plan spending, savings, and category targets instead of only tracking historical results.

## Why

ocent already covers tracking, analytics, forecasting, and contracts. Budgeting adds the missing planning layer for monthly and yearly financial decisions.

## Scope

- define monthly and yearly budgets
- define category-level budget targets
- define savings goals and planning targets
- define budget versus actual views
- define how budgeting interacts with liquidity forecasts and recurring finance events

## Acceptance Criteria

- budgeting periods and targets are documented
- category-based budgeting is included
- savings goal requirements are explicitly listed
- budget versus actual analysis is defined conceptually
- the output supports later dashboard, analytics, and planning implementation
